center.name: Iwo Jima rail
center.summary: Iwo Jima rail是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括白眉田雞，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Iwo Jima rail, a doubtfully valid subspecies formerly native to Iwo Jima, is now extinct

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Iwo Jima rail, a doubtfully valid subspecies formerly native to Iwo Jima, is now extinct
